name: gear
description: A ten-skill SDLC toolkit for Claude Code. /gear:sdlc orchestrates six role skills (pm, sa, dev, qa, sec, tw) through the SDLC phases (Discovery, Design, Build, QA, Security, Docs) with hard human gates; each role skill also runs standalone for single-phase use. /gear:council convenes a panel of functional lenses that debate a hard call and return one synthesized verdict. /gear:retro reflects on a session and files reusable lessons (gated). /gear:triage turns a verdict or review into a prioritized remediation backlog that sdlc executes. One model voicing many roles - honest by design, not a team of independent experts. gear:sdlc fans work out across agents via a schema-bound task contract, with git-worktree isolation and adversarial verification. For UI slices, gear:pm offers a mockup + preview URL and gear:dev builds with frontend-design. Experimental.
